## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Environment

- **Windows version:** (e.g. Windows 11 23H2)
- **Python version:** (e.g. 3.11.4)
- **WindowsAgent version:** (run `windowsagent version`)
- **Target app:** (e.g. Microsoft Outlook 2024, Notepad)
- **DPI scaling:** (e.g. 125%)

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open ...
2. Run `windowsagent act ...`
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What should have happened.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error output:

```
Paste error here
```

## Additional context

Any other relevant information (screenshots, app version, custom config, etc.)
